meta.title: Session runtime inspection — Admin
meta.description: Inspect runtime readiness and provider linkage for a specific session.

page.title: Session runtime inspection
page.note: Inspect runtime readiness and provider linkage for a specific session. This surface is visibility-only and does not provide admin controls.

items.status: Session status, mode, and scheduling timestamps.
items.readiness: Join readiness flags and blocked reason when applicable.

items.noControls: No runtime preparation or join controls are exposed here.
items.noIntervention: No live-session intervention or provider controls exist here.
items.noEdits: This tool does not edit or override session data.

lookup.heading: Inspect a session by ID
lookup.note: Enter a real session ID to fetch the runtime inspection snapshot.
lookup.helper: Use a real session ID from payments, support, or session operations.

summary.title: Session snapshot
summary.note: Baseline session context associated with the runtime inspection.

provider.title: Provider linkage
provider.note: Provider identifiers used to troubleshoot runtime readiness.

readiness.title: Runtime readiness
readiness.note: Join readiness and blocker detail from the runtime resolver.

context.title: Operational context
context.note: This inspection is visibility-only. It does not change session status or provider state.

result.title: Inspection details
result.note: Use this snapshot to confirm runtime readiness and provider linkage for operations.

attendance.heading: Attendance telemetry
attendance.note: Visibility-only attendance signals from persisted provider events.

empty.heading: No attendance events yet
empty.note: Attendance telemetry has not been recorded for this session yet.

error.heading: Attendance telemetry unavailable
error.generic: Could not load attendance telemetry right now.

blockedReasons.SESSION_NOT_JOINABLE_STATUS: Session status does not allow joining
blockedReasons.SESSION_NOT_VIDEO_MODE: Session is not in video mode
blockedReasons.SESSION_TIME_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: Join window is not open yet
blockedReasons.SESSION_RUNTIME_NOT_PREPARED: Runtime has not been prepared yet

empty.heading: Enter a session ID
empty.note: Provide a session ID to load the runtime inspection snapshot.

error.heading: Runtime inspection unavailable
error.note: We could not load the runtime inspection right now.

notFound.heading: Session not found
notFound.note: We could not find a session with this ID.

errors.generic: Could not load runtime inspection right now.

inspector.metaDescription: Manual review of attendance and runtime evidence. No automatic decision is taken from this screen.

page.title: Session Evidence Review
page.subtitle: This page shows attendance and runtime evidence to support manual admin review. No decision is executed automatically here.
page.advisoryNotice: Review recommendation only — final decision is manual

lookup.heading: Inspect a session by ID
lookup.helper: Enter a session ID to review its attendance and runtime evidence.

recommendation.title: Recommendation
recommendation.subtitle: Advisory suggestion — not executed automatically
recommendation.isFinalDecision: This is not a final decision

reasons.INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: No attendance events were recorded and no platform join attempts were logged for this session.
reasons.MANUAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED: This session needs a manual review because the evidence is not sufficient to make a clear recommendation.
reasons.COMPLETION_CANDIDATE: There is enough attendance and overlap between patient and practitioner, and the session is a completion candidate pending admin review.
reasons.PATIENT_NO_SHOW_CANDIDATE: The practitioner joined, but there is not enough evidence that the patient joined within the scheduled window.
reasons.PRACTITIONER_NO_SHOW_CANDIDATE: The patient joined, but there is not enough evidence that the practitioner joined within the scheduled window.
reasons.BOTH_NO_SHOW_CANDIDATE: There is not enough evidence that the patient or the practitioner joined.
reasons.TECHNICAL_REVIEW_CANDIDATE: Both parties joined, but overlap or evidence quality suggests a possible technical issue.
reasons.FALLBACK: This session needs a manual review.

overlap.title: Overlap
overlap.subtitle: Time both parties were present together
overlap.unreliableWarning: Overlap may be incomplete because one or more intervals are still open or missing a safe close boundary.

timeline.title: Attendance timeline
timeline.subtitle: Chronological join and leave events
timeline.note: Note: this timeline shows attendance events only. Platform join/token events are summarized above when they are not available as timeline events from the API.
timeline.noteUnified: This timeline merges attendance events with platform-side events (join attempts, token issuance, meeting lifecycle) into one chronological view.
timeline.platformNote: Join attempts and token events are shown as counters in the attendance cards. Showing them as timeline events requires the backend to expose them in the timeline.

empty.heading: No attendance evidence available
empty.note: No Daily attendance events arrived and no platform join attempts were recorded for this session.
empty.nextStep: Check the session time, payment status, and Webhook configuration if events were expected.

raw.title: Technical details
raw.subtitle: For technical review only — contains no sensitive secrets.

roomClose.title: Room close evidence
roomClose.subtitle: Persisted room-close state and related support tickets.
roomClose.empty: Video room has not been closed manually.

reasons.closedAfterScheduledEnd: Closed after the scheduled end time

tickets.title: Linked support tickets
tickets.empty: No support tickets are linked to this session.
tickets.noLinkedTickets: No related support tickets were found for this session.

emptyExtended.title: No computed evidence available
emptyExtended.note: The extended attendance summary has not been emitted for this session yet.

states.notFound: No session found for this ID.

manualDecision.title: Manual admin decision
manualDecision.subtitle: Record a manual decision after reviewing the evidence
manualDecision.safetyNotice: This is a manual admin decision after evidence review. This screen does not create automatic refunds or payouts.

statusImpact.label: Status impact
statusImpact.willMutate: Session status will be updated to {status}.
statusImpact.noChange: Session status will not change. The decision will only be recorded.

confirmations.evidenceReviewed: I reviewed the attendance evidence and event log.
confirmations.noAutomaticRefund: I understand this decision does not create an automatic refund.
confirmations.noAutomaticPayout: I understand this decision does not create an automatic payout.

supersede.warningNote: A final decision already exists for this session. You must supersede it to record a new one.
supersede.checkboxLabel: I want to supersede the current final decision with a new one.

adminNote.label: Admin note
adminNote.noSensitiveData: Do not include sensitive personal data in notes.

errors.SESSION_DECISION_ALREADY_FINAL: A final decision already exists. You must supersede it first.
errors.SESSION_DECISION_REQUIRES_PAST_END: This session has not ended yet. Decisions can only be recorded after the scheduled end time.
errors.SESSION_DECISION_NOT_ALLOWED_STATUS: This session status does not allow manual decisions.
errors.SESSION_DECISION_NOT_ELIGIBLE: This session is not eligible for a manual admin decision in its current state.
errors.SESSION_DECISION_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED: All three confirmations are required before submitting.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to record manual decisions.
errors.generic: Could not record the decision right now.

success.title: Decision recorded
success.note: The manual decision has been recorded successfully.

manualDecision.noPermission: You can view decision history, but you do not have permission to record a manual decision.

history.title: Decision history
history.empty: No manual decisions have been recorded for this session.
